name: Roast Turkey Breast with Rosemary & Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim any excess fat from the turkey breast.
2. Make small slits in the top of the breast and insert garlic slivers and rosemary (or dried rosemary if fresh is unavailable).
3. In a small bowl, combine honey, Dijon mustard, olive oil, lemon juice, and pepper. Mix well.
4. Brush the mixture evenly over the turkey breast, including the salt.
5. Place the turkey in a baking dish with the meaty side up.
6. Roast at 350°F for 45 to 60 minutes, depending on the size of the breast. Baste every 10 to 15 minutes until cooked through.
7. To carve, slice the meat off the bone diagonally.
